economic_notes: Three government business enterprises accounted for under modified equity: Qathen Xwegus Management Corporation (100%), Klahoose Investment Limited Partnership (99.99%), and Klahoose Forestry No.2 Limited Partnership (99.99%). Also holds minor investment in BC First Nations Gaming Fund. Revenue sharing of $2,251,450 received. Forestry and range income of $640,312.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2022, not 2024. Three GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Qathen Xwegus Management Corporation (net equity deficit of -$3,989,405), Klahoose Investment Limited Partnership (equity $24,337,869), and Klahoose Forestry No.2 LP (equity $303,466). Share of loss from GBEs was -$1,148,877 in 2022 vs gain of $8,136,506 in 2021 - this drives large variance in revenue between years. Prior year surplus was $9,285,879 largely due to GBE equity gains. No schedule of remuneration included in the document. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $2,647,107 + CMHC $7,952 + DFO $130,114 + FNHA $671,086 + Province of BC $1,691,032 = $5,147,291. osr = $7,988,481 - $5,147,291 = $2,841,190.
